mapper.insert: insert into shoppingcart(user_id, flower_id, quantity, selected, added_price, shop_id, shop_name) values (#{userId}, #{flowerId}, #{quantity}, #{selected}, #{addedPrice}, #{shopId}, #{shopName})
mapper.select: select cart_item_id, user_id, flower_id, quantity, selected, added_price, created_at, updated_at, shop_id, shop_name from shoppingcart where user_id = #{userId} and flower_id = #{flowerId}

SELECT sc.cart_item_id as cartItemId, sc.flower_id as flowerId, f.flower_name as flowerName, f.main_image as mainImage, f.price as price, f.meaning as meaning, f.tags as tags, sc.quantity, sc.selected, sc.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.status FROM shoppingcart sc LEFT JOIN flowers f ON sc.flower_id = f.flower_id LEFT JOIN shops s ON sc.shop_id = s.shop_id WHERE sc.user_id = #{userId}
